question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter the length and width of a rectangle. Calculate and print both the area and the perimeter of the rectangle, ensuring to use appropriate data types for real-world measurements.

test_cases.expected:
Enter length of the rectangle: Enter width of the rectangle: 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length: 12.30
Width: 4.50
Area: 55.35
Perimeter: 33.60

Enter length of the rectangle: Invalid input. Please enter a numeric value for length.
Enter length of the rectangle: Enter width of the rectangle: 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length: 10.00
Width: 5.00
Area: 50.00
Perimeter: 30.00

Enter length of the rectangle: Length must be a positive value. Please try again.
Enter length of the rectangle: Enter width of the rectangle: 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length: 10.00
Width: 5.00
Area: 50.00
Perimeter: 30.00
